emails.subject: Austin Energy Contract Draft
emails.body: Austin Energy Contract Draft I have red-lined the changes that I feel we need to address for a short term spot deal with the City of Austin. Please review and let me have your comments. If you want ENA to do the deal, I need to make a few additional changes for the items ENA cannot do.
